frontmatter.title: Avatar Code
frontmatter.description: Below are code examples demonstrating different ways to use the Avatar component—including image-based avatars, initials, icons, sizing variations, and custom styling. These implementations showcase the flexibility and adaptability of the component across various interface needs.
